briefdescription.para: Allocates a new csc matrix that is lambda * I.
Counts the number of diagonal elements in upper triangular CSC matrix M.

simplesect.para: Number of nonzeros on the diagonal of M.

briefdescription.para: Adds reg * I to a CSC matrix. Called on P prior to construction of KKT system in qoco_setup(). This function calls realloc() when adding new nonzeros. Matrix P is freed using free_qoco_csc_matrix.

parameterdescription.para: Number of new element added to diagonal.
Indices of elements of M->x that are added.

briefdescription.para: Subtracts lambda * I from a CSC matrix. Called on P when updating matrix data in qoco_update_matrix_data(). This function does not allocate and must be called after regularize.
Computes the infinity norm of each column (or equivalently row) of a symmetric sparse matrix M where only the upper triangular portion of M is given.

parameterdescription.para: Upper triangular part of sparse symmetric matrix.

briefdescription.para: Computes the infinity norm of each column of M and stores in norm.

parameterdescription.para: An m by n sparse matrix in CSC format.

briefdescription.para: Computes the infinity norm of each row of M and stores in norm.

parameterdescription.para: An m by n sparse matrix.

briefdescription.para: Scales the rows of M by E and columns of M by D. M = diag(E) * M * diag(D)

parameterdescription.para: An m by n sparse matrix.

briefdescription.para: Inverts permutation vector p and stores inverse in pinv.
C = A(p,p) = PAP' where A and C are symmetric and the upper triangular part is stored.
